name: Grilled Garlic Chicken
recipeIngredient: Envelope Lipton Recipe Secrets Garlic Mushroom Soup Mix
3 tablespoons olive oil or vegetable oil
4 boneless skinless chicken breast halves, about 1.25 pounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the soup mix with the oil.
2. Add the chicken; toss to coat evenly.
3. Grill or broil until the chicken is no longer pink inside when cut in half.
4. Serve and enjoy.
